mainEntity.name: What are the steps in a voice assistant optimization project?

acceptedAnswer.text: The usual workflow is research, rewrite, mark up, test, and refine. First you identify question phrases, then you create concise answers, then you add schema and monitor whether the page gets surfaced more often.
acceptedAnswer.description: Most projects follow the same path: research voice queries, rewrite the content, add schema, improve speed, and measure results. Then you refine based on what gets impressions and clicks.
